title: verbascum × thessalum
intro: Verbascum × thessalum, also known as the Thessaly mullein, is a hybrid plant species of Verbascum, a genus of flowering plants. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Verbascum × thessalum include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies. Verbascum × thessalum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
